title: Sony confirms end of PlayStation disc production and sparks debate on the future of physical media
summary: The Japanese company will stop manufacturing discs for its consoles, triggering reactions from developers like Hideo Kojima and legal questions about digital preservation.

title: Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls blocked in 132 countries for requiring PSN account
summary: The Marvel-based fighting game repeats Helldivers 2's problem by requiring PlayStation Network login, limiting its global access.

title: Meccha Chameleon sells 15 million copies in less than a month and surpasses Mario Kart World
summary: The action hit also teases a collaboration with a famous Japanese star after reaching the milestone.

title: Danganronpa 2×2 delayed until 2027 and adds alternate story mode with more content
summary: The mystery game remaster will include 20% more content and a 3D map, but its release is postponed.

title: Square Enix does not rule out bringing Final Fantasy XV and other titles to Nintendo Switch 2
summary: The Japanese company is evaluating the possibility of several games in the series, including the fifteenth chapter, arriving on Nintendo's next console.

title: Nintendo president pledges to fight Pokémon card scalping
summary: After printing billions of units without meeting demand, the company announces measures against speculators.

title: Nintendo named best developer of the year by Famitsu magazine
summary: The Japanese company thanks the recognition and reaffirms its dedication to quality in its games.

title: The seventh Shantae game will officially arrive in 2027
summary: The platform series confirmed a new installment for two years from now, exciting its fans.

title: Video game industry union launches aid fund for laid-off developers
summary: The initiative aims to provide financial support to workers affected by recent layoffs.

title: Epic Games settles lawsuit against former employee over Fortnite collaboration leak
summary: The company reached an out-of-court settlement with the accused of revealing confidential information about the popular game.

title: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners releases second season with a more dramatic approach
summary: The animated series returns with new episodes that move away from the action style to adopt a more realistic narrative.

title: First English trailer for Yoko Taro's Evangelion series now available
summary: The preview shows the upcoming adaptation of the classic anime by the creator of Nier, generating great anticipation.

title: Summer Games Done Quick 2026 kicks off with its charity speedrun marathon
summary: The annual event brings together players from around the world to quickly complete games and raise funds for charitable causes.

title: Persona 4: The Animation can be watched for free on YouTube
summary: The studio released the full anime series based on the RPG at no cost, allowing fans to enjoy it legally.

title: Petition to bring back wolf character in Love and Deepspace surpasses 300,000 signatures
summary: Players of the dating game demand that developers reinstate an attractive character removed in an update.

title: Crimson Desert receives update 1.13.00 with new missions and improvements
summary: The patch adds additional content and performance optimizations to the open-world game.

title: Half-Life 2 mod to get stealth prequel set in the Combine universe
summary: The independent project lets players take on the role of an assassin from the human resistance.

title: Darktide introduces the Skitarii class, the most unique in the game so far
summary: The new playable character brings unique abilities and expands the lore of the Warhammer 40k universe.

title: Sony says its next console will not compete with PC and will offer exclusive value
summary: The Japanese company seeks to differentiate its platform with experiences impossible to replicate on computers.

title: Square Enix faces harsh criticism over its stance on video game preservation
summary: Fans and experts consider the measures announced by the company to preserve its historical catalog insufficient.
